title: 9. Visual Replies
description: How image-generation settings, visual reply dock behavior, and automatic image policy fit together.

steps.title: What Visual Reply Does
steps.body: Visual Reply lets NC generate images when the assistant asks for one or when background sensory behavior is allowed to request one.

steps.title: Open Visual Settings
steps.body: Visual settings choose whether image generation is enabled, which provider is used, what model is selected, and whether the dock appears automatically.

steps.title: Mode and Provider
steps.body: Mode is the master Visual Reply setting. Provider and model decide where the image request is sent when generation is allowed.

steps.title: Automatic Images
steps.body: The Vision tab has the master policy for spontaneous hidden visual generation. Keep it off if you only want images when you explicitly ask.

steps.title: Open the Dock
steps.body: Use the Visual Reply button to inspect generated images, captions, and the latest visual output state.
